# CWE-290 — Authentication Bypass by Spoofing (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-290-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: trusts X-Remote-User from the client instead of server session state.
func WhoAmI(c *gin.Context) {
	user := c.GetHeader("X-Remote-User")
	if user == "" {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "anonymous"})
		return
	}
	c.Set("user", user)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"user": user})
}
